title: And commutativity
statement: theorem logic_and_comm (p q : Prop) (h : p ∧ q) : q ∧ p
description: Swap the two sides of a conjunction.

title: Equality rewrite
statement: theorem eq_rewrite (a b : Nat) (h : a = b) : a + 1 = b + 1
description: Use an equality hypothesis to rewrite the goal.

title: Nat add zero
description: A standard simplification theorem over natural numbers.

title: Nat zero add
description: A good repair-loop example: some naive proofs fail, simp usually works.

title: Nil append
statement: theorem list_nil_append (xs : List Nat) : [] ++ xs = xs

title: Length append
statement: theorem list_length_append (xs ys : List Nat) : (xs ++ ys).length = xs.length + ys.length
description: A slightly more interesting list theorem with a stdlib simp lemma.
